productDisplayName: Puma Men Ducati Graphic White Tshirts
description: Composition White round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, Ducati in rubber print below the nape of the neck, brand logo in rubber print on the right sleeve and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean There are bikes, and then there's Ducati. Bike enthusiasts swear by this Italian bike manufacturer. This white Ducati Graphic t-shirt from puma is made for all you Ducati freaks. Wear it when you're riding it, or dreaming of riding it! Team it with a pair of jeans or shorts and zoom away in style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulder-18"
